title.ko: 신호 시스템, 예. 개인 호출 시스템; 주문 전신; 경보 시스템
title.en: SIGNALLING SYSTEMS, e.g. PERSONAL CALLING SYSTEMS; ORDER TELEGRAPHS; ALARM SYSTEMS

definition.ko: 신호 또는 호출 시스템 신호의 전송에 특징이 있는 것 G08B1/00 표시 특성에 특징이 있는 것; 가청; 가시; 가촉; 결합된 것 G08B3/00; G08B5/00; G08B6/00; G08B7/00 지령 발신장치 G08B9/00 경보시스템 불특정 상태에 응답하는 것 G08B23/00 둘 이상의 상이한 상태에 응답하는 것 G08B19/00 하나의 특정상태에 응답하는 것; 잠입; 화재; 기타 G08B13/00; G08B15/00 G08B17/00; G08B21/00 중앙국으로부터 또는 중앙국으로의 전송을 행하는 것 G08B25/00; G08B26/00; G08B27/00 예보 경보시스템 G08B31/00 점검, 감시 G08B29/00

title.en: Systems for signalling characterised solely by the form of transmission of the signal
using only mechanical transmission
using hydraulic transmission; using pneumatic transmission
hydraulic only
using electric transmission

using only mechanical transmission

with reset means necessitating a separate operation to return the indicator element

with indicator element moving about a pivot, e.g. hinged flap or rotating vane
with reset means necessitating a separate operation to return the indicator element
with hinged flap or arm
with rotating or oscillating members, e.g. vanes
with indicator element moving rectilinearly
with reset means necessitating a separate operation to return the indicator element
using visible light sources
using flashing light
using smoke, fire or coloured gases
Tactile signalling systems, e.g. tactile personal calling systems

title.ko: 그룹 G08B3/00 ～ G08B6/00 중 2 이상에 해당하는 신호 시스템
title.en: Signalling systems according to two or more of groups G08B0003000000-G08B0006000000
using mechanical transmission
using hydraulic transmission; using pneumatic transmission
using electric transmission
using explosives
Order telegraph apparatus, i.e. means for transmitting one of a finite number of different orders at the discretion of the user, e.g. bridge to engine room orders in ships
Details
Means for recording operation of the apparatus
Means for indicating disagreement between orders given and those carried out
mechanical
using ratchet
using rotary shaft
hydraulic; pneumatic
using ratchet
by varying displacement of the fluid
by varying pressure of the fluid
Burglar, theft or intruder alarms
Mechanical actuation
by breaking of glass
by tampering with fastening
by opening, e.g. of door, of window, of drawer, of shutter, of curtain, of blind
by pressure on floors, floor coverings, stair treads, counters, or tills
by the breaking or disturbance of stretched cords or wires
by lifting or attempted removal of hand-portable articles
Actuation by interference with mechanical vibrations in air or other fluid
Actuation by interference with heat, light, or radiation of shorter wavelength; Actuation by intruding sources of heat, light, or radiation of shorter wavelength
using active radiation detection systems
by interruption of a radiation beam or barrier
using radiation reflectors
using light guides, e.g. optical fibres
by interference of a radiation field
using passive radiation detection systems
using infrared-radiation detection systems
using pyroelectric sensor means
using focusing means
using image scanning and comparing systems
using television cameras
Actuation by change of fluid pressure
Electrical actuation
by interference with electromagnetic field distribution
by proximity of an intruder causing variation in capacitance or inductance of a circuit
Identifying, scaring or incapacitating burglars, thieves or intruders, e.g. by explosives
with smoke, gas, or coloured or odorous powder or liquid
Fire alarms; Alarms responsive to explosion
Mechanical actuation of the alarm, e.g. by the breaking of a wire
Hydraulic or pneumatic actuation of the alarm, e.g. by change of fluid pressure
Electric actuation of the alarm, e.g. using a thermally-operated switch
Actuation involving the use of explosive means

title.ko: 연기나 가스의 존재에 의하여 동작하는 것
title.en: Actuation by presence of smoke or gases
using a light emitting and receiving device
for detecting light-scattering due to smoke
using an ionisation chamber for detecting smoke or gas
Constructional details

title.ko: 특정한 가스, 예. 화재에 의한 연소 생성물을 검출하는 장치를 사용하는 것(G08B 17/103, G08B 17/11이 우선)
title.en: by using a detection device for specific gases, e.g. combustion products, produced by the fire (G08B0017103000, G08B0017110000 take precedence)
Actuation by presence of radiation or particles, e.g. of infrared radiation or of ions
Alarms responsive to two or more different undesired or abnormal conditions, e.g. burglary and fire, abnormal temperature and abnormal rate of flow
Alarm responsive to formation or anticipated formation of ice

title.ko: 단일의 특정한 바람직하지 못한 또는 이상상태에 응답하는 경보 내지 다른 곳에 속하지 않는 것
title.en: Alarms responsive to a single specified undesired or abnormal condition and not otherwise provided for
Alarms for ensuring the safety of persons

title.ko: 비활동적인 것에 응답하는 것, 예. 노인들의 비활동성 (G08B21/06이 우선)
title.en: responsive to non-activity, e.g. of elderly persons (G08B0021060000 takes precedence)
indicating a condition of sleep, e.g. anti-dozing alarms
responsive to the presence of persons in a body of water, e.g. a swimming pool; responsive to an abnormal condition of a body of water
responsive to calamitous events, e.g. tornados or earthquakes

title.ko: 물질의 바람직하지 않은 방출에 응답하는 것, 예. 오염경보
title.en: responsive to undesired emission of substances, e.g. pollution alarms
Toxic gas alarms (G08B0021160000 takes precedence)
Combustible gas alarms
Status alarms (G08B0021020000 takes precedence)
responsive to moisture
responsive to presence or absence of persons
Reminder alarms, e.g. anti-loss alarms
Alarms responsive to unspecified undesired or abnormal conditions
Alarm systems in which the location of the alarm condition is signalled to a central station, e.g. fire or police telegraphic systems
characterised by the transmission medium
using a single signalling line, e.g. in a closed loop
using power transmission lines
using communication transmission lines
using wireless transmission systems
Manually actuated calamity alarm transmitting arrangements
Central alarm receiver or annunciator arrangements
Alarm systems in which substations are interrogated in succession by a central station
Alarm systems in which the alarm condition is signalled from a central station to a plurality of substations

title.ko: 신호의 점검 또는 감시 시스템, 또는 경보시스템; 작동에러의 방지 또는 수정, 예. 허가되지 않은 작동의 방지
title.en: Checking or monitoring of signalling or alarm systems; Prevention or correction of operating errors, e.g. preventing unauthorised operation
Monitoring continuously signalling or alarm systems
Monitoring of the detection circuits
Monitoring of the line circuits, e.g. signalling of line faults
Signalling of tampering with the line circuit
Monitoring of the annunciator circuits
Checking intermittently signalling or alarm systems
checking the detection circuits
Security signalling or alarm systems, e.g. redundant systems

title.ko: 작동에러의 방지 또는 수정 (G08B29/02, G08B29/12가 우선)
title.en: Prevention or correction of operating errors (G08B0029020000, G08B0029120000 take precedence)
Calibration, including self-calibrating arrangements
Provisions facilitating manual calibration, e.g. input or output provisions for testing; Holding of intermittent values to permit measurement
Self-calibration, e.g. compensating for environmental drift or ageing of components
by updating and storing reference thresholds
by changing the gain of an amplifier
Predictive alarm systems characterised by extrapolation or other computation using updated historic data
